name: Rabbit Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust rabbit pieces in flour and shake off excess. Brown in olive oil on all sides in a large black iron pot. Remove and keep warm.
2. Add onions and garlic to the same oil; cook until clear, not brown.
3. Drain off excess oil and return the rabbit to the pot.
4. Pour on sherry.
5. Add broth and strained marinade. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 to 1-1/2 hours.
